docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF AUG-29-2017 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF AUG-29-2017 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF LARRY WASSERMAN IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT CARDENIO PETRUCCI IS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF SUBMITTED AN UNFILED PROOF OF SERVICE. DEFENDANT WAIVES SERVICE OF THE CLAIM. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF WASSERMAN, LARRY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT PETRUCCI, CARDENIO $9,174.47 PRINCIPAL, $75.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $9,249.47 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $9,174.47 FILED BY WASSERMAN, LARRY AS TO DEFENDANT PETRUCCI, CARDENIO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-29-2017 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-29-2017 - JUDGMENT.
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, THE JUDGMENT IN THIS ACTION HAS BEEN PAID IN FULL OR OTHERWISE SATISFIED. AS TO DEFENDANT PETRUCCI, CARDENIO
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (NO FEE FOR SERVICE) SERVED JUL-14-2017, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT PETRUCCI, CARDENIO
